hotels.description_en:
Featuring free WiFi throughout the property, Michel House is located in Nazareth, 200 metres from Nazareth Old City. Mary's Well is 350 metres away.
Each room at this inn is air conditioned and features a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. There is also a kettle. All rooms have a private bathroom equipped with a shower. Extras include free toiletries and a hairdryer.
Christ Church is 300 metres from Michel House, while St. Gabriel's Church is 400 metres from the property. The nearest airport is Ben Gurion Airport, 88 km from the property.

hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Abu Hanna Boutique by Ahlan Hospitality in Nazareth offers a riad with a garden, terrace, and bar. Guests enjoy private check-in and check-out, concierge service, and free on-site parking.
Comfortable Amenities: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, tea and coffee makers, hairdryers, free toiletries, showers, TVs, dining areas, electric kettles, and wardrobes. Balconies provide additional comfort.
Prime Location: Located 35 km from Haifa Airport, the property is a short walk from St. Gabriel's Church and near Nazareth Old City (1 km). Other attractions include The Church of the Annunciation (13-minute walk) and Mount Tabor (18 km).
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for its attentive staff, comfortable rooms, and convenient location.
